address: Bo Put Beach Road, Bo Put, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84320
opening_hours: Best in the late afternoon and evening

description.en: Samui's most useful evening zone for walking, dining, and one night that does not depend on resort isolation or Chaweng clubs.
description.nl: De bruikbaarste avondzone van Samui voor wandelen, eten en een avond die niet afhangt van resortisolatie of clubs in Chaweng.

metaDescription.en: Why Fisherman's Village is the best evening stop on Koh Samui and how to use Bophut without turning it into a filler daytime visit.
metaDescription.nl: Waarom Fisherman's Village de beste avondstop op Koh Samui is en hoe je Bophut gebruikt zonder er een filler-bezoek overdag van te maken.

enhanced_description:
Fisherman's Village matters because it gives Koh Samui one evening zone that feels broader than hotel dining and softer than Chaweng nightlife. That balance is exactly why it deserves a place in a first itinerary. It is easy to walk, useful for dinner, and strong enough to carry one night of the trip on its own.

The better move is to use Bophut after dark instead of forcing it into a midday sightseeing slot. The atmosphere, restaurants, small-shop frontage, and market rhythm all work better once the heat drops and the island shifts into evening mode. Used that way, it gives Samui a more layered social side without turning the night into a club crawl.
detailed_history: Anantara Bophut's official Samui experiences guide still highlights Fisherman's Village as one of the island's clearest shopping, dining, and nightlife anchors close to the north coast. That is useful because it confirms what matters in practice: Bophut is not the island's grand cultural monument, but it is one of its most functional and enjoyable evening districts.
visitor_experience: Expect a walkable shoreline district with restaurants, bars, small retail frontage, and a more social evening atmosphere than most stand-alone resorts can offer. The point is not to race through every storefront. The point is to let one Samui evening feel open-ended and easy instead of sealed inside the hotel.

best_time_to_visit.crowd_level: Moderate to lively, especially on market nights and around dinner

practical_info.how_to_get_there: Reach it easily from Bophut, Choeng Mon, Chaweng, or northeast Samui by taxi or ride-hailing.
practical_info.nearby_attractions: North-coast hotels, Bophut beach areas, and other northeast Samui evening stops.
practical_info.food_options: One of Samui's better evening dining zones, with both casual and more deliberate dinner options.
practical_info.shopping: Useful for casual browsing, small boutiques, and market-style wandering rather than serious destination shopping.

insider_tips: Treat Bophut as an evening anchor, not a daytime attraction checklist.
Walk first and decide where to eat once you have seen the full mood of the area.
This is the cleaner alternative to spending every night in Chaweng.
verified_note: Source-backed summary based on Anantara Bophut's official experiences guide and local route context. Specific market-night programming and vendor mix can vary.
cultural_significance: Fisherman's Village gives Koh Samui one of its clearest non-resort social zones and helps the island feel less one-dimensional than a pure beach-and-hotel trip.

contentSources.name: Anantara Bophut Koh Samui Experiences Guide 2025
